assertions.title: Stripe Customer Portal Endpoint

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with body containing Stripe portal URL
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with error: Billing not configured, code: INTERNAL_ERROR

assertions.issues: Stripe is not configured in the local worker. No STRIPE_SECRET_KEY or STRIPE_PRICE_ID environment variables set.

assertions.title: spikes billing CLI Command

steps.expected: CLI opens browser to Stripe Customer Portal
steps.observed: CLI outputs error: Server error. Please try again in a moment or contact support if it persists.

evidence.cliOutput: Error: Server error. Please try again in a moment or contact support if it persists.

assertions.issues: CLI correctly maps INTERNAL_ERROR to actionable message, but billing endpoint is blocked due to Stripe dependency.

steps.expected: CLI displays formatted usage with spike count, share count, tier, and upgrade message
steps.observed: CLI shows table: 5/5 shares (100%), 0/1000 spikes (0%), FREE tier, upgrade warning

evidence.cliOutput:
Account: FREE tier

Shares: 5 / 5 (100%)
Spikes: 0 / 1000 (0%)

You're approaching your free tier limits!
Upgrade to Pro: https://spikes.sh/pro

assertions.title: spikes upgrade CLI Command

steps.expected: CLI opens browser to Stripe Checkout for Pro subscription
steps.observed: CLI outputs error: Server error. Please try again in a moment or contact support if it persists.

evidence.cliOutput: Error: Server error. Please try again in a moment or contact support if it persists.

assertions.issues: CLI command calls /billing/checkout endpoint which returns 'Billing not configured' error due to missing Stripe configuration.

assertions.title: Free-to-Pro Upgrade Flow

steps.expected: Error with SHARE_LIMIT code and upgrade CTA
steps.observed: CLI shows: You've reached the free tier limit (5 shares). Delete a share or upgrade at https://spikes.sh/pro

steps.expected: 429 with code SHARE_LIMIT and upgrade_url field
Browser opens Stripe checkout, user upgrades to pro
steps.observed: Blocked - CLI returns server error, Stripe not configured

evidence.cliShareOutput: Error: You've reached the free tier limit (5 shares). Delete a share or upgrade at https://spikes.sh/pro

assertions.issues: Limit enforcement and CTA display works correctly. Full upgrade flow cannot complete due to Stripe dependency.

blockers.description: Stripe is not configured in the local worker (spikes-hosted). STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_PRICE_ID environment variables are required for /billing/portal, /billing/checkout endpoints to function.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified worker returns 'Billing not configured' error. No way to configure Stripe in local dev without real credentials.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-MON-004), 4 blocked due to Stripe dependency (VAL-MON-001, VAL-MON-002, VAL-MON-006, VAL-CROSS-002). The usage command (VAL-MON-004) works correctly, showing formatted usage with progress bars and upgrade CTA. Limit enforcement (part of VAL-CROSS-002) works - API returns SHARE_LIMIT code with upgrade_url, CLI shows actionable message. However, Stripe-dependent endpoints (portal, checkout) cannot be tested in local environment without Stripe credentials.
